Patch Set 3:

The test result seems reflect the older version of robot. Please make sure to use the latest robot, for example, uninstall robot and re-install it. The latest testsuite of robot doesn't include pomba-validation service and already fixed pomba-kibana' protocol (https vs http).
Abandoned
